_meta.description: Table rendering policy to prevent truncation while preserving unit and header context.

rules.trigger: A table output exceeds UI row budget
rules.notes: Do not truncate rows; use pagination or stream chunks and clear continuation labels.

rules.trigger: Rendered table includes numeric columns with units
rules.notes: Keep units in column headers and footers.

rules.trigger: Table merge may obscure unit metadata
rules.notes: Repeat compact unit annotation per repeated header lineage.

rules.trigger: Renderer decides to shorten numeric precision
rules.notes: Do not auto-round numbers if numeric integrity risk applies.

templates.text: Use machine-actionable policy fallback when a specific template is missing in table_render_policy.
